findings.title: Fresh-database validation coverage is incomplete
findings.evidence: 100_validation.sql validates names and selected structures but not every column definition, all constraint/index definitions, exact function signatures/attributes, trigger definitions, policy commands/expressions, or the full positive ACL model.
findings.requiredResolution: Regenerate 100_validation.sql with complete deterministic catalog assertions.

findings.title: Runtime function attributes and generation report disagree
findings.evidence: Twelve SECURITY DEFINER runtime RPCs omit an explicit volatility clause. The generation report says all 17 RPCs have explicit invoker security, while SQL contains 12 definer and five invoker RPCs.
findings.requiredResolution: Regenerate with explicit approved volatility/security attributes and correct the generation report without changing owner-approved behavior.

findings.title: Generated documentation lacks complete manifest hash and size records
findings.evidence: The manifest fully hashes executable SQL, but does not record final size/SHA-256 fields for README.md and the generation report.
findings.requiredResolution: Use a documented non-recursive hashing contract that records final sizes and hashes for every generated artifact.

findings.title: The 27-to-33 policy expansion is not fully documented in generated artifacts
findings.evidence: RLS-001, RLS-025, and RLS-027 intentionally create no browser policy; two decisions split; seven supporting policies use AUTH-001 or UNIQUE-001. The generation report instead says all 27 RLS decisions map immediately before replacement policies.
findings.requiredResolution: Record every generated policy source/approval/classification and the intentional no-policy outcomes for all 27 Production decision areas.

acceptedObjects.status: Structurally accounted for; repository acceptance withheld pending High finding resolution.

securityReview.knownViolationClassification: Staging-release and Version 1.0 blocker; not a baseline-generation blocker.

recommendations: Regenerate only through the locked baseline process.
Expand read-only validation to exact object definitions and ACL posture.
Make every function attribute explicit and align the report with SQL.
Complete the non-recursive documentation hashing contract.
Embed the complete 27-to-33 policy traceability rationale.
Keep isolated PostgreSQL execution as a staging blocker.
